title: original
summary: Link relation type "original": The Target IRI points to an Original Resource. Defined in RFC7089.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: The Target IRI points to an Original Resource.
raw_columns.Notes:
An Original Resource is a resource that exists or used to
      exist, and for which access to one of its prior states may be
      required.
